query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_student_difficulty_profiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  topicId INT NOT NULL,
  currentDifficultyLevel VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'medium',
  successRate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  lastAttemptAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalAttempts INT DEFAULT 0,
  averageScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  highestScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  lowestScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  streakCorrect INT DEFAULT 0,
  streakIncorrect INT DEFAULT 0,
  recommendedNextDifficulty VARCHAR(20),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_topic (userId, topicId),
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (topicId) REFERENCES bridge_academy_topics(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
